dates.notes: 2025 dates were 29-30 September at Conrad Singapore Marina Bay; 2026 dates not yet announced

registration.notes: Open to all interested individuals (subject to approval). Funding available through Singapore FinTech Association scheme for eligible participants.

events.attendee_profile: 600+ participants including global family offices, leading investors, ecosystem partners, advisors
tracks: Owner's Symposium and Single Family Office Forum (Day 1)
speakers: Past keynotes from MAS officials
Global family office principals
Investment thought leaders

events.name: Campden Wealth Asia-Pacific Family Office & Investment Forum 2026

registration.notes: Attendance strictly limited to qualifying family offices, family businesses, and UHNWs. Must complete qualification process. Contact: Janice Tham (members) or Livi Septiani (non-members)

events.attendee_profile: Qualifying family offices, family businesses, ultra-high-net-worth individuals; Campden Club members
events.theme: The New Dynasty: Family Offices Shaping Asia's Investment Future
related_events: 15th Asia-Pacific Family Enterprise & Wealth Creation Forum (March 10-11, 2026, Singapore)

research_notes: Mingtiandi events offer good real estate industry networking at accessible prices
Family office forums largely invitation-based or member-only - target UHNW principals
ULI provides broad cross-sector real estate exposure with strong Asia-Pacific focus
WMI Summit backed by MAS/EDB suggests high-quality Singapore government engagement
Prestel & Partner offers free admission for qualified family offices (USD 150M+ AUM)
Consider early bird registration for Mingtiandi Singapore Forum (deadline April 3)
